name: Midnight Glass
unlockLine: The glass trail wakes up after midnight.

name: Coral Drifter
unlockLine: A reef racer with too much courage.

name: Clockwork Duchess
unlockLine: Polished brass, sharp timing.

name: Blue Hour Rogue
unlockLine: A quiet runner from the last blue light.

name: Bread Crumb
unlockLine: Leaves a trail nobody can follow.

name: Glacier Rider
unlockLine: A cold-start machine with hot hands.

name: Silver Orbit
unlockLine: Spins light into speed.

name: Crimson Kicks
unlockLine: Every lane feels electric.

name: Mirror Mask
unlockLine: The crowd sees what it wants.

name: Polar Guard
unlockLine: A clean guard for messy lanes.

name: Golden Lamp
unlockLine: Three sparks. One problem.

name: Velvet Fang
unlockLine: Soft suit, sharp bite.

name: Honey Riot
unlockLine: Sticky luck and gold armor.

name: Pixel Mechanic
unlockLine: Fixes sparks, breaks scores.

name: Spore Dash
unlockLine: Small cap. Big bounce.

name: Shadow Ninja
unlockLine: Only the trail admits it was there.

name: Galactic Knight
unlockLine: An oath written in glow.

name: Jungle Crown
unlockLine: Runs like vines are cheering.

name: Ocean Queen
unlockLine: The lanes move like water.

name: Red Hoodline
unlockLine: A red flash between tall shadows.

name: Iron Gear
unlockLine: Built from bolts and bad ideas.

name: Skyline Thread
unlockLine: A high-wire blur above traffic.

name: Night Beacon
unlockLine: When the light hits, it moves.

name: Storm Anvil
unlockLine: Heavy sound, fast feet.

name: Moss Titan
unlockLine: Too loud to be stopped.

name: Turbo Bike
unlockLine: A helmet visor and engine heat.

name: Chrome Roadster
unlockLine: A silver streak with no license plate.

name: Neon Chopper
unlockLine: Low, loud, and somehow legal.

name: Rally Ghost
unlockLine: Leaves dust but no tracks.

name: Monster Truck
unlockLine: It does not dodge lanes. It owns them.

name: Rocket Helmet
unlockLine: One spark away from orbit.

name: Cyber Samurai
unlockLine: Old discipline, new electricity.

name: Space Pony
unlockLine: A little sparkle, a lot of velocity.

name: Candy Count
unlockLine: Sweet enough to be suspicious.

name: Lunar Witch
unlockLine: A clean curse for dirty lanes.

name: Sun Prince
unlockLine: Runs like sunrise owes rent.

name: Dream Pilot
unlockLine: Steers through sleep at full speed.

name: Arcade Alien
unlockLine: Came for tokens, stayed for chaos.

name: Street Mage
unlockLine: Paints shortcuts into the air.

name: Voltage Cop
unlockLine: A siren made of blue light.

name: Desert Ronin
unlockLine: Wind at the back, steel at the side.

name: Velvet Detective
unlockLine: Solved the case. Kept running.

name: Plasma Pirate
unlockLine: Boards ships made of light.

name: Prism Angel
unlockLine: A halo with speed lines.

name: Rainbow Rebel
unlockLine: Rules look better broken.

name: Magma Queen
unlockLine: A crown that never cools.

name: Sapphire Sprinter
unlockLine: Cut clean from blue fire.

name: Paper Dragon
unlockLine: Looks fragile. Burns bright.

name: Emerald DJ
unlockLine: Drops beats and lane changes.

name: Final Boss
unlockLine: The vault saved this one for last.
